text:
This file 
is updated quarterly, and effective May 2014 is available for free online from the CMS website (2005–
current). 

There is a special numbering system for units of hospitals that are excluded from prospective payment 
system (PPS) and hospitals with SNF swing-bed designation. Starting in 2021, an alpha character in the 
third position of the provider number identifies the category of institutional provider that furnished 
services to the beneficiary during the stay. This applies to
